metadata.title: The River of Dreams
metadata.lyrics:
[00:17.27] Ooh, ah
[00:24.18] (In the middle of the-, I go walking in the-)
[00:26.96] (In the middle of the-, I go walking in the-)
[00:29.57] (In the middle of the-, I go walking in the-)
[00:32.37] (In the middle of the-, I go walking in the-)
[00:33.76] In the middle of the night (middle of the night)
[00:36.27] I go walking in my sleep (I go walking in my sleep)
[00:39.12] From the mountains of faith (mountains of faith)
[00:41.49] To a river so deep (river so deep)
[00:44.43] I must be looking for something (looking for something)
[00:47.15] Something sacred I lost (something sacred I lost)
[00:49.84] But the river is wide (world is wide)
[00:52.48] And it's too hard to cross (too hard to cross)
[00:56.53] Even though I know the river is wide
[00:58.42] I walk down every evening and I stand on the shore
[01:01.84] I try to cross to the opposite side
[01:03.60] So I can finally find out what I've been looking for
[01:07.18] In the middle of the night (middle of the night)
[01:09.87] I go walking in my sleep (I go walking in my sleep)
[01:12.62] Through the valley of fear (valley of fear)
[01:15.13] To a river so deep (river so deep)
[01:17.92] I've been searching for something (searching for something)
[01:20.52] Taken out of my soul (taken out of my soul)
[01:23.19] Something I'd never lose (never lose)
[01:25.91] Something somebody stole (something somebody stole)
[01:29.83] I don't know why I go walking at night
[01:31.87] But now I'm tired and I don't wanna walk anymore
[01:35.35] Hope it doesn't take the rest of my life
[01:37.22] Until I find what it is that I've been looking for
[01:42.02] In the middle of the night (middle of the night)
[01:44.68] I go walking in my sleep (I go walking in my sleep)
[01:47.39] Through the jungle of doubt (jungle of doubt)
[01:49.80] To the river so deep (river so deep)
[01:52.63] I know I'm searching for something (searching for something)
[01:55.36] Something so undefined (so undefined)
[01:57.86] That it can only be seen (only be seen)
[02:00.69] By the eyes of the blind
[02:03.22] In the middle of the night (I go walking in the-)
[02:05.98] (In the middle of the-, I go walking in the-)
[02:08.69] (In the middle of the-, I go walking in the-)
[02:11.26] (In the middle of the-, I go walking in the-)

[02:19.44] (In the middle of the-, I go walking in the-)
[02:22.07] (In the middle of the-, I go walking in the-)
[02:24.65] (In the middle of the-)
[02:26.19] Not sure about a life after this
[02:28.08] God knows I've never been a spiritual man
[02:31.44] Baptized by the fire, I wade into the river
[02:34.16] That is running through the promised land
[02:39.50] In the middle of the night (middle of the night)
[02:42.27] I go walking in my sleep (I go walking in my sleep)
[02:44.78] Through the desert of truth (desert of truth)
[02:47.41] To the river so deep (river so deep)
[02:50.17] We all end in the ocean (end in the ocean)
[02:52.80] We all start in the streams (start in the streams)
[02:55.55] We're all carried along (carried along)
[02:58.24] By the river of dreams
[03:00.75] In the middle of the night (I go walking in the-)
